title: Fix maintenance mode toggle error in admin panel

requirements.text: In backend/main.mo, ensure the setMaintenanceMode(enabled: Bool) function has absolutely no authorization or identity check of any kind — no caller validation, no admin principal check, no 'Unauthorized' guard. The function must accept calls from any caller including anonymous, update the stable maintenanceMode variable, and return without error. Verify the stable variable holding the maintenance mode flag persists across canister upgrades and is never re-initialized to false on restart.

quotes: In admin panel if I click on maintenance mode button it shows error

acceptanceCriteria: The setMaintenanceMode function in backend/main.mo has no caller identity check, no require statement, and no 'Unauthorized' throw or return of any kind.
Calling setMaintenanceMode(true) or setMaintenanceMode(false) from an anonymous identity succeeds without error.
The maintenanceMode stable variable is declared with the `stable` keyword and retains its value across canister upgrades.
The function does not re-initialize the stable variable to false on canister restart or upgrade.

requirements.text: In frontend/src/components/admin/UsersControlsPanel.tsx, update the useSetMaintenanceMode mutation's onError handler to display only a user-friendly toast error message such as 'Failed to update maintenance mode. Please try again.' Never display raw IC rejection error strings, replica error bodies, Request IDs, reject codes, or HTTP details on screen.

quotes: In admin panel if I click on maintenance mode button it shows error

acceptanceCriteria: When the setMaintenanceMode mutation fails, only the message 'Failed to update maintenance mode. Please try again.' is shown to the admin — no raw IC error string is displayed.
The toast notification is dismissible and does not block the admin panel UI.
On success, the toggle reflects the updated state and a success toast is shown.

requirements.text: In frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, verify and fix the useSetMaintenanceMode mutation hook to correctly call the backend actor's setMaintenanceMode(enabled: Bool) method. Ensure the hook uses the actor from the useActor hook, wraps the call in a try/catch, and on error throws a user-readable error string rather than the raw IC rejection. Invalidate the 'maintenanceMode' query key on success so the toggle immediately reflects the new state.

quotes: In admin panel if I click on maintenance mode button it shows error

acceptanceCriteria: useSetMaintenanceMode calls actor.setMaintenanceMode(enabled) with the correct boolean argument.
On error, the hook's onError callback receives a human-readable string, not a raw IC rejection object.
On success, the React Query cache for the maintenanceMode query key is invalidated so the toggle UI updates automatically.
The hook uses the actor returned by the useActor hook.

constraints: Do not add any authorization or identity checks to setMaintenanceMode in backend/main.mo.
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts or any file under frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not remove the History or Downloads sections from the HamburgerMenu.
nonGoals: Changing the PIN authentication flow for the admin panel.
Modifying any other admin panel tab (Poetry, Dua, Songs, Content Management).
Altering the block/unblock or getAllUsers functionality.
